title: Chavran #2362
definition:
Hauran = "caverns"

 1) a province of Palestine east of the Sea of Galilee; exact region
    uncertain but probably on the borders of the desert in the tetrarchy
    of Philip
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hauran = "caverns"

 1) a province of Palestine east of the Sea of Galilee; exact region
    uncertain but probably on the borders of the desert in the tetrarchy
    of Philip

    NASB:  a district S.E. of Mount Hermon
